articles.author: Daniel de Visé
articles.title: Americans fear this retirement setback more than death - USA Today
articles.description: Americans have several retirement fears. The big ones are mostly about money.
articles.content:
Americans are less concerned about dying and more perturbed by the financial implications of remaining alive.
Thats one finding from an annual survey by the Allianz Center for the Future of Retireme… [+5953 chars]
